shell.heading: Production-grade auth, batteries included.
shell.description: This isn't a placeholder login screen. Sign in or sign up and you'll land on a real, role-gated dashboard backed by Better Auth, D1, and Drizzle.

session.title: Sessions, roles, and bans
session.body: Better Auth handles cookies, CSRF, and the user / admin role split. Banned users are blocked at the edge.

password.title: Email + password
password.body: Email + password is on by default. Swap in OAuth providers via Better Auth's adapter — the form layer doesn't care.

storage.title: Drizzle on D1
storage.body: Users, sessions, and accounts live in Cloudflare D1 with Drizzle migrations. No external auth service to pay for.

runtime.title: Workers-native
runtime.body: Every request runs on Cloudflare Workers. No Node.js. Bindings come from a typed CloudflareEnv.

login.title: Welcome back
login.description: Sign in to your account to continue.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.description: Sign up to explore the boilerplate from a logged-in perspective.
